Gemini Watermark Remover · by UKH

Remove Gemini AI
Watermarks Instantly

A powerful Tampermonkey userscript that automatically detects and removes watermarks from Gemini AI-generated images — copy, download, and share clean images with one click.

⬇ Install Userscript 🖼 Try Live Demo ⭐ GitHub
100%
Client-Side Processing
0ms
Server Roundtrip
3
Supported Formats
MIT
Open Source
Features

Everything you need,
nothing you don't

Built with advanced reverse alpha-blending algorithms to perfectly restore Gemini AI images.

🔬
Precision Detection
Advanced watermark detection using spatial and gradient analysis — finds and targets the exact watermark region every time.
⚡
Real-Time Processing
Watermarks are removed the moment Gemini loads your image — no waiting, no extra steps, fully automatic.
📋
One-Click Copy
Copy the processed image directly to your clipboard — paste it anywhere without saving a file first.
💾
Full-Size Download
Download the full-resolution watermark-free image as PNG with Gemini's native download flow — no quality loss.
🔒
100% Private
All processing happens in your browser. No images are ever uploaded to any server. Your data stays yours.
🖼
Before/After Preview
Use the interactive slider to compare original and processed images side-by-side in the demo tool.
How It Works

Up and running in minutes

Install once, remove watermarks forever — completely hands-free after setup.

1
Install Tampermonkey
Add the Tampermonkey extension to Chrome, Firefox, or Edge from your browser's extension store.
2
Install Userscript
Click "Install Userscript" above and confirm in Tampermonkey to add the GWR script.
3
Open Gemini
Navigate to gemini.google.com and generate any image — the script activates automatically.
4
Copy or Download
Hit the copy or download button — your image is watermark-free and full resolution.

Ready to remove watermarks?

Install the userscript in seconds and start getting clean images from Gemini AI right now.

⬇ Install Now — It's Free 🖼 Try the Demo Tool
